steps.title: Add a parallel function
steps.content: The first sentence says guard cells help regulate carbon dioxide intake. The next sentence gives another function of the same cells: regulating water loss. The relationship is additive, not contrasting, temporal, or concluding.

steps.title: Test transition signals
steps.content: Choice A signals a prior time, but no time shift is present. Choice C signals a conclusion, though the sentence adds a second fact. Choice D signals replacement or contrast, but guard cells perform both functions. The answer is B.
